title: Duralap
subtitle: Real-time Messaging & Video Calling
description: A full-featured real-time communication platform with instant messaging and peer-to-peer video calling. Built with a modern reactive Android frontend and a high-throughput backend.
features: Real-time 1-on-1 & group messaging via WebSockets
Peer-to-peer video calling with WebRTC
End-to-end encrypted message storage in MongoDB
Redis pub/sub for presence & typing indicators
Jetpack Compose UI with adaptive layouts

title: Meal Management System
subtitle: University Hall Dining Platform
description: A role-based dining management system for university residential halls, enabling Students, Managers, and Provosts to manage meals, track expenses, and generate analytical reports.
features: Three-tier role system: Student, Manager, Provost
Daily meal booking, cancellation & tracking
Expense analytics and monthly bill generation
Admin dashboard with database-backed reporting
Secure JWT authentication & authorization

title: Bazar — Market Monitor
subtitle: Commodity Price Tracking & Analytics
description: A data-driven market monitoring platform that tracks daily commodity prices, detects inflation trends, and enables crowd-sourced or admin-verified price reporting to prevent artificial price hikes.
features: Real-time commodity price tracking dashboard
Inflation trend analysis with visual charts
Crowd-sourced price submissions with admin verification
Algorithmic detection of artificial price manipulation
Clean analytical views with historical data

title: Personal Portfolio Web Platform
subtitle: Interactive 3D React Showcase
description: This very site — a premium, high-performance interactive 3D portfolio built with React, React Three Fiber, and Tailwind CSS, featuring a live particle constellation, animated 3D geometry, and Vercel serverless API.
features: Interactive 3D particle constellation background
Animated wireframe torus knot with mouse parallax
Scroll-driven section reveal animations
Glassmorphism UI with gold & emerald color scheme
Vercel serverless contact API
